# Unitrans Ltd. & Uniagent Varna Ltd.

> Your trusted partner in Bulgarian ports since 1993. Ship agency, freight
> forwarding, customs brokerage and port operations across all major Bulgarian
> sea and river ports.

## Facts

- Two specialised Bulgarian companies operating as one coordinated team since 1993.
- Unitrans Ltd.: freight forwarding, customs brokerage, port logistics, terminal operations.
- Uniagent Varna Ltd.: ship agency, husbandry services, ship repairs, dry-dock coordination.
- Head office: 1, Vardar Str., 9000 Varna, Bulgaria.
- Contact: uniagent@unitrans.bg, +359 52 632 130.
- Team: 20 experienced professionals. ISO certified.
- Ports covered — Black Sea: Varna (HQ), Burgas, Balchik. Danube: Ruse, Lom,
  Svishtov, Vidin, Silistra, Tutrakan, Oryahovo.
- Core cargo expertise: grain and bulk (wheat, corn, barley, sunflower seeds,
  rapeseed, vegetable oils), plus fertilisers, steel, containers, project and
  breakbulk cargo.
- Duty teams available 365 days a year; daily loaded/discharged quantity reports.
- Clients include leading international grain traders and agricultural companies
  (Cargill, ADM, CHS Inc. and others).

## Pages

- https://unitrans.bg/en — English homepage · https://unitrans.bg/bg — Bulgarian
- /en/about — company history since 1993, the two companies, strengths
- /en/services — ship agency, freight forwarding, customs brokerage, port operations in detail
- /en/cargo — grain & bulk cargo expertise (wheat, corn, barley, sunflower, rapeseed, oils)
- /en/ports — all 10 Bulgarian ports covered + live AIS vessel map
- /en/contact — enquiry form, phone, email, office address
- /en/nominate — structured vessel nomination form (port, cargo, quantity, laycan)
- /en/blog — practical articles on Bulgarian port operations

## Blog highlights

- Anatomy of a port call in Varna — how a vessel call works step by step
- Grain season in Bulgarian ports — the annual export rhythm
- Customs clearance practical guide — documents, temporary storage, broker's role
- The Danube ports — Ruse, Lom and the river gateway to Central Europe
